name: tuyens-agent-skills
description: Marketplace for Tuyen's Agent Skills plugins: architecture, delivery, oncall, java, kotlin, python, rails, node, go, and dotnet.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: 37 skills (13 workflow + 24 atomic) for multi-stack development - auto-detects any tech stack from CLAUDE.md

plugins.name: delivery
plugins.description: 6 workflow skills for software delivery: release planning, go-live monitoring, scope breakdown, tech debt triage, dependency upgrade assessment, and cross-PR conflict detection.

plugins.name: architecture
plugins.description: Stack-agnostic architecture design plugin: system design, API contract design, pre-implementation risk analysis, and ADR creation.

plugins.name: oncall
plugins.description: 8 skills (4 workflow + 3 atomic) for oncall work: triage, investigation, root cause analysis, and postmortem. Requires core plugin.

plugins.name: java
plugins.description: 12 skills and 11 agents for Java 21+ / Spring Boot 3.5+ development.

plugins.name: kotlin
plugins.description: 5 skills and 11 agents for Kotlin 2.0+ / Spring Boot 3.5+ development. Requires java plugin.

plugins.name: python
plugins.description: 9 skills and 11 agents for Python 3.11+ / FastAPI / Django development.

plugins.name: rails
plugins.description: 8 skills and 11 agents for Ruby on Rails 7+/8 development.

plugins.name: node
plugins.description: 10 skills and 11 agents for Node.js/TypeScript development.

plugins.name: go
plugins.description: 9 skills and 11 agents for Go/Gin development.

plugins.name: dotnet
plugins.description: 11 skills and 11 agents for .NET 8 LTS / ASP.NET Core Web API development with Clean Architecture.
